## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the stated problem.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I considered whether a changeset is needed for publishable package changes.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, or private data.
